## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] CSS/API change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example/demo
- [ ] Maintenance

## Visuals

Add screenshots or a screen recording for visual changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept class names under the `gs-` prefix.
- [ ] I rebuilt `dist/gessi.css` with `npm run build`.
- [ ] I ran `npm pack --dry-run`.
- [ ] I updated documentation if the public API changed.
- [ ] I checked reduced-motion behavior for animation changes.
